mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_template (template_name, template_code, schema_json, version, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{templateName}, #{templateCode}, #{schemaJson}, #{version}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_name, template_code, schema_json, version, status, created_at, updated_at FROM form_template WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, template_name, template_code, schema_json, version, status, created_at, updated_at FROM form_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode}
SELECT id, template_name, template_code, schema_json, version, status, created_at, updated_at FROM form_template ORDER BY created_at DESC
